predicate.title: Absorb the original design brief into knowledge; retire the loose prose files
predicate.problem: The original prompt and the superseded session-state file were the last prose in docs/ outside the knowledge base — unaddressable as context and exempt from the drift gate. Owner directive: add the brief to knowledge, then clean up both files.
acceptance_criteria: The brief exists verbatim as brief-s0..brief-s9 reference nodes (one per section, provenance noted)
Both loose files are deleted; no generated doc links to them
README and PURPOSE point at the knowledge-base location instead
